guardrails.title: Use Parameterized Queries
guardrails.body: DQL and QueryBuilder shall use parameter bindings. String concatenation in queries is prohibited.

guardrails.title: Service Layer Separation
guardrails.body: Business logic shall reside in Service classes. Controllers shall remain thin.

guardrails.title: Use Voter for Authorization
guardrails.body: Authorization logic shall be consolidated in Voter classes. Scattering permission checks across controllers is prohibited.

guardrails.title: Use DTO for External Input
guardrails.body: External input shall be received via DTO combined with Validator. Direct mapping from Request to Entity is prohibited.

guardrails.title: No Bundles for Application Code
guardrails.body: When adding application code: do not wrap it in a Bundle. Use the default Symfony directory structure (config/, src/, templates/) and organize with PHP namespaces.

guardrails.title: Environment Variables for Infrastructure Only
guardrails.body: When deciding configuration strategy: use environment variables only for infrastructure settings (DB connections, external API URLs, etc.). Use parameters in config/services.yaml (with the app. prefix) for application behavior.

guardrails.title: Use Messenger for Async Processing
guardrails.body: When designing asynchronous or background processing: use Symfony Messenger and always configure a failure transport.

guardrails.title: UX Package Selection Criteria
guardrails.body: For projects using Symfony UX when designing frontend: static componentsâ†’TwigComponent, JS behaviorâ†’Stimulus, server-side reactiveâ†’LiveComponent, partial updatesâ†’Turbo Frame, multi-target DOMâ†’Turbo Stream, real-timeâ†’Mercure + Turbo Stream.

guardrails.title: LiveComponent Performance Design
guardrails.body: For projects using Symfony UX LiveComponent: plan to avoid unnecessary re-renders at the spec stage. Specify LiveProp granularity, debounce settings, and where to apply defer/lazy.

guardrails.title: Stable Public Interfaces
guardrails.body: When modifying public interfaces (Contracts/, etc.): treat them as stable APIs and be careful about breaking changes.

guardrails.title: Use Enums for Fixed Values
guardrails.body: When defining a fixed set of values: use PHP 8.1 enums instead of constants (case names in UpperCamelCase).

guardrails.title: Constructor Injection Only
guardrails.body: When using services: use constructor injection only. Prohibit service retrieval via $container->get(). Default to autowiring + autoconfiguration and keep services private.

guardrails.title: Define Forms as PHP Classes
guardrails.body: When creating forms: define them as PHP classes. Do not build forms directly in controllers. Place buttons in templates and define validation constraints on the target object.

guardrails.title: Restrict |raw Filter Usage
guardrails.body: When writing Twig templates: use |raw only for trusted and sanitized content. Do not disable default escaping.

guardrails.title: snake_case for Template Naming
guardrails.body: When creating templates: use snake_case for template names, directory names, and variable names. Prefix template fragments with an underscore (_partial.html.twig).

guardrails.title: Key-Based Translations
guardrails.body: When implementing translations: use keys that describe intent rather than literal strings. Use XLIFF format for translation files.

guardrails.title: Doctrine Mapping with PHP Attributes
guardrails.body: When defining Doctrine entities: use PHP attributes (#[ORM\Entity], etc.) instead of XML/YAML mappings.

guardrails.title: Schema Changes via Migrations
guardrails.body: When modifying database schema: prohibit direct manipulation. Use Doctrine Migrations.

guardrails.title: Use AssetMapper for Web Assets
guardrails.body: When managing web assets: use AssetMapper. Do not introduce unnecessary frontend build complexity.

guardrails.title: Prefer Single Firewall
guardrails.body: When configuring security: use a single firewall unless multiple systems are required. Use auto for the password hasher.

guardrails.title: Stimulus Controller Name Match
guardrails.body: For projects using Stimulus: ensure the controller filename (kebab-case) matches the HTML data-controller attribute value. Name mismatches are the most common source of bugs.

guardrails.title: Stimulus: No DOM Assumptions on connect()
guardrails.body: For projects using Stimulus: do not assume DOM elements exist at connect() time. Check element existence or use the appropriate lifecycle hook.

guardrails.title: Turbo Frame ID Match
guardrails.body: For projects using Turbo: the Frame id must match the <turbo-frame id> in the server response. A mismatch fails silently.

guardrails.title: Turbo Cache JS Re-initialization
guardrails.body: For projects using Turbo: account for cases where Stimulus controller connect() is not re-executed when Turbo Drive restores from cache.

guardrails.title: Turbo Stream Redirect Loss
guardrails.body: For projects using Turbo: account for cases where Turbo Stream responses disappear in a form submit â†’ redirect flow.

guardrails.title: TwigComponent Props Leak
guardrails.body: For projects using TwigComponent: control ExposeInTemplate properly to prevent unwanted props from leaking into HTML attributes.

guardrails.title: LiveProp Required for State
guardrails.body: For projects using LiveComponent: add the LiveProp attribute to any property whose state should be preserved. Properties without LiveProp are reset on re-render.

guardrails.title: No Complex Objects as LiveProp
guardrails.body: For projects using LiveComponent: limit LiveProps to scalar values or simple DTOs. Complex objects cause hydration errors.

guardrails.title: Lock UX Icons Before Deploy
guardrails.body: For projects using UX Icons: run ux:icons:lock before deploying to production to eliminate the Iconify API dependency.

guardrails.title: UX Map Height Required
guardrails.body: For projects using UX Map: always set an explicit CSS height on the map container. Omitting it collapses the map to 0px.

guardrails.title: No $container->get()
guardrails.body: When using services: prohibit the service locator pattern via $container->get(). Use constructor injection.

guardrails.title: No Direct Form Building in Controllers
guardrails.body: When creating forms: prohibit $this->createFormBuilder() and similar direct form building in controllers. Use form PHP classes.

guardrails.title: |trans Filter Required
guardrails.body: When displaying user-facing text: apply the |trans filter to all user-facing strings in templates. Hardcoded strings are prohibited.

guardrails.title: Detect |raw Filter Usage
guardrails.body: During review: detect |raw filter usage in Twig templates and verify the XSS risk is justified.

guardrails.title: Detect Stimulus Name Mismatch
guardrails.body: During review for projects using Stimulus: verify that data-controller attribute values in HTML correspond to files under controllers/.

guardrails.title: Detect Turbo Frame ID Mismatch
guardrails.body: During review for projects using Turbo: verify that turbo-frame id matches between request origin and response.

guardrails.title: Detect Non-LiveProp State Dependency
guardrails.body: During review for projects using LiveComponent: detect patterns where state is held in properties lacking the LiveProp attribute.

guardrails.title: Verify ux:icons:lock Execution
guardrails.body: During review for projects using UX Icons: verify that ux:icons:lock is included in the deployment configuration.
